# Tech Architecture & Rules
**Generated By:** @tech-lead
**Last Updated:** 2026-03-06

---

## 1. Technology Stack

### MVP Phase (Frontend-First Approach)

| Category | Technology | Version / Notes |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Frontend Framework** | Next.js (React) | v14+ with App Router |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS | v3.4+ with custom design tokens |
| **UI Components** | shadcn/ui | Radix-based, fully customizable |
| **State Management** | Zustand | Lightweight global state |
| **Server State** | TanStack Query (React Query) | v5+ for caching & async state |
| **Form Handling** | React Hook Form | v7+ with Zod schema validation |
| **Validation** | Zod | TypeScript-first schema validation |
| **Icons** | Lucide React | Consistent icon library |
| **Charts** | Recharts | For Analytics Dashboard charts |
| **YouTube Integration** | YouTube Data API v3 + IFrame Player API | Search + Playback |
| **Animation** | Framer Motion | For micro-interactions & confetti |
| **Date Handling** | date-fns | Lightweight date utility |
| **HTTP Client** | Native Fetch | Wrapped in custom hooks |
| **Package Manager** | pnpm | Fast, disk-efficient |
| **Runtime** | Node.js | v20+ LTS |

### Post-MVP Phase (Planned)

| Category | Technology | Notes |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Backend** | Supabase | PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime + Storage |
| **Authentication** | Supabase Auth | Email + OAuth providers |
| **Database** | PostgreSQL (Supabase) | Row Level Security enabled |
| **Real-time** | Supabase Realtime | For OBS overlay sync |
| **File Storage** | Supabase Storage | Profile images, custom assets |
| **Payment** | Stripe | Real payment processing |

---

## 2. Project Structure

```
frens-mvp/
├── docs/                          # Documentation (Feature-Based)
│   ├── 00-Project-Overview.md
│   ├── 01-Architecture-And-Rules.md
│   ├── 02-Implementation-Plan.md
│   ├── moms/                      # Meeting minutes
│   └── features/                  # Feature specs
│       ├── 01-Landing-Page.md
│       ├── 02-Authentication.md
│       └── ...
│
├── src/
│   ├── app/                       # Next.js App Router
│   │   ├── (marketing)/           # Public pages (Landing)
│   │   ├── (auth)/                # Auth pages (Login, Register)
│   │   ├── (dashboard)/           # Protected dashboard pages
│   │   ├── (viewer)/              # Viewer public profile pages
│   │   ├── overlay/               # OBS overlay routes (no auth)
│   │   ├── layout.tsx
│   │   └── page.tsx
│   │
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── ui/                    # shadcn/ui components
│   │   ├── layout/                # Layout components (Header, Sidebar, Footer)
│   │   ├── landing/               # Landing page components
│   │   ├── auth/                  # Auth components
│   │   ├── dashboard/             # Dashboard components
│   │   ├── player/                # Player & Queue components
│   │   ├── overlays/              # OBS overlay components
│   │   ├── viewer/                # Viewer profile components
│   │   └── shared/                # Shared/reusable components
│   │
│   ├── hooks/                     # Custom React hooks
│   │   ├── use-youtube-search.ts
│   │   ├── use-player.ts
│   │   ├── use-queue.ts
│   │   └── ...
│   │
│   ├── lib/
│   │   ├── utils.ts               # Utility functions (cn, etc.)
│   │   ├── youtube.ts             # YouTube API client
│   │   ├── mock-data.ts           # Mock data for MVP
│   │   └── constants.ts           # App constants
│   │
│   ├── store/                     # Zustand stores
│   │   ├── auth.store.ts
│   │   ├── player.store.ts
│   │   ├── queue.store.ts
│   │   └── settings.store.ts
│   │
│   ├── types/                     # TypeScript types
│   │   ├── index.ts
│   │   ├── user.ts
│   │   ├── donation.ts
│   │   ├── song.ts
│   │   └── ...
│   │
│   └── styles/
│       └── globals.css            # Global styles + Tailwind
│
├── public/
│   ├── images/
│   ├── sounds/                    # Alert sounds
│   └── fonts/
│
├── .env.local                     # Environment variables
├── .env.example                   # Example env file
├── tailwind.config.ts
├── next.config.js
├── tsconfig.json
├── package.json
└── pnpm-lock.yaml
```

## 3. Global Coding Standards

### TypeScript Guidelines

```typescript
// ✅ Prefer explicit types for props and function returns
interface ButtonProps {
  variant?: "primary" | "secondary" | "ghost";
  size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg";
  children: React.ReactNode;
  onClick?: () => void;
}

// ✅ Use Zod for runtime validation
const DonationSchema = z.object({
  amount: z.number().min(0.5).max(1000),
  message: z.string().max(200).optional(),
  songId: z.string(),
});

// ✅ Prefer const assertions for literal types
export const QUEUE_SORT_OPTIONS = ["fifo", "highest_first"] as const;
type QueueSortOption = (typeof QUEUE_SORT_OPTIONS)[number];
```

### Naming Conventions

| Type | Convention | Example |
|:-----|:-----------|:--------|
| Components | PascalCase | `DonationCard.tsx` |
| Hooks | camelCase with `use` prefix | `useDonation.ts` |
| Stores | camelCase with `.store` suffix | `player.store.ts` |
| Types | PascalCase | `Donation`, `StreamerProfile` |
| Constants | SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE | `MAX_DONATION_AMOUNT` |
| CSS Classes | kebab-case (via Tailwind) | `bg-primary-orange` |
| Files | kebab-case | `donation-card.tsx` |

### Component Guidelines

```tsx
// ✅ Component structure
interface ComponentProps {
  // Props first
}

export function Component({ prop1, prop2 }: ComponentProps) {
  // 1. Hooks at the top
  const [state, setState] = useState();
  
  // 2. Derived values
  const computed = useMemo(() => ..., []);
  
  // 3. Event handlers
  const handleClick = useCallback(() => {}, []);
  
  // 4. Early returns
  if (loading) return <Skeleton />;
  
  // 5. Main render
  return (
    <div className="...">
      {/* Content */}
    </div>
  );
}
```

### State Management Rules

| State Type | Solution | Example |
|:-----------|:---------|:--------|
| **Server State** | TanStack Query | Donations, Songs, Analytics |
| **Global Client State** | Zustand | Auth, Player, Queue, Settings |
| **Local Component State** | useState | Form inputs, UI toggles |
| **URL State** | Next.js useSearchParams | Search queries, filters |

### Error Handling

```typescript
// ✅ Use Result pattern for operations
type Result<T, E = Error> = 
  | { success: true; data: T }
  | { success: false; error: E };

// ✅ Consistent error boundaries
<ErrorBoundary fallback={<ErrorFallback />}>
  <Component />
</ErrorBoundary>

// ✅ Toast notifications for user-facing errors
toast.error("Failed to process donation. Please try again.");
```

---

## 4. Database Architecture (Post-MVP)

### Global Rules (Applies to All Tables)

| Rule | Implementation |
|:-----|:---------------|
| **Primary Keys** | UUID v4 (`gen_random_uuid()`) |
| **Timestamps** | `created_at`, `updated_at` (auto-managed) |
| **Soft Deletes** | `deleted_at` (nullable timestamp) |
| **Audit Trail** | `created_by`, `updated_by` (nullable UUID) |
| **Row Level Security** | Enabled on all tables |

### Entity Relationship Overview

```
users (streamers)
    ├── profiles (1:1)
    ├── donations (1:many)
    ├── songs (1:many, via queue)
    └── overlay_settings (1:many)

donations
    └── songs (1:1, requested song)

songs (queue items)
    └── donations (1:1, linked to donation)
```

---

## 5. API Design Standards (Post-MVP)

### RESTful Conventions

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|:-------|:---------|:--------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/profiles/:id` | Fetch single resource |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/profiles` | List resources (paginated) |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/donations` | Create resource |
| `PATCH` | `/api/v1/donations/:id` | Partial update |
| `DELETE` | `/api/v1/donations/:id` | Soft delete |

### Response Format

```typescript
// ✅ Success response
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "total": 100
  }
}

// ✅ Error response
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
    "message": "Amount must be at least $0.50",
    "details": { ... }
  }
}
```

### Authentication Headers

```
Authorization: Bearer <jwt_token>
X-Request-ID: <uuid>
```

---

## 6. Third-Party Integrations

### YouTube Data API v3

| Use Case | Endpoint | Quota Cost |
|:---------|:---------|:-----------|
| Song Search | `search.list` | 100 units/request |
| Video Details | `videos.list` | 1 unit/request |

**Quota Management:**
- Daily quota: 10,000 units (free tier)
- Implement client-side caching (5 min TTL)
- Debounce search input (300ms)

### YouTube IFrame Player API

```typescript
// Player initialization
const player = new YT.Player("player", {
  height: "0",
  width: "0",
  videoId: "VIDEO_ID",
  playerVars: {
    autoplay: 1,
    controls: 0,
    modestbranding: 1,
  },
  events: {
    onReady: onPlayerReady,
    onStateChange: onPlayerStateChange,
  },
});
```

---

## 7. Security Standards

### MVP Phase

| Concern | Implementation |
|:--------|:---------------|
| **XSS Prevention** | React auto-escapes, DOMPurify for user content |
| **CSRF** | Not applicable (no backend) |
| **Input Validation** | Zod schemas on all forms |
| **Sensitive Data** | No PII stored in MVP (mock only) |
| **API Keys** | YouTube API key via env var, domain-restricted |

### Post-MVP Phase

| Concern | Implementation |
|:--------|:---------------|
| **Authentication** | Supabase Auth with JWT |
| **Authorization** | Row Level Security (RLS) |
| **Rate Limiting** | Edge middleware rate limits |
| **CORS** | Strict origin whitelist |
| **HTTPS** | Enforced via hosting platform |

---

## 8. Performance Standards

| Metric | Target | Strategy |
|:-------|:-------|:---------|
| **First Contentful Paint** | < 1.5s | Static generation, image optimization |
| **Largest Contentful Paint** | < 2.5s | Critical CSS inline, lazy loading |
| **Time to Interactive** | < 3.5s | Code splitting, tree shaking |
| **YouTube Search** | < 2s | Debouncing, caching |
| **OBS Overlay Render** | 60fps | Minimal DOM, CSS animations |

### Optimization Strategies

```typescript
// ✅ Dynamic imports for code splitting
const Dashboard = dynamic(() => import("./Dashboard"), {
  loading: () => <DashboardSkeleton />,
});

// ✅ Image optimization
<Image 
  src="/avatar.png" 
  alt="Avatar" 
  width={120} 
  height={120}
  priority // For above-fold images
/>

// ✅ Memoization for expensive computations
const sortedQueue = useMemo(
  () => queue.sort(sortByDonation),
  [queue]
);
```

---

## 9. Environment Variables

```bash
# .env.local (MVP Phase)

# YouTube API
NEXT_PUBLIC_YOUTUBE_API_KEY=your_api_key_here

# App Configuration
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000
NEXT_PUBLIC_PLATFORM_FEE_PERCENTAGE=5

# Post-MVP (Supabase)
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=your_supabase_url
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your_anon_key
```

---

## 10. Git & Deployment

### Branch Strategy

```
main          # Production-ready code
  └── develop # Development integration
       └── feature/xxx-yyy  # Feature branches
       └── fix/xxx-yyy      # Bug fix branches
```

### Commit Convention

```
feat: add donation checkout flow
fix: resolve queue reordering bug
docs: update API documentation
style: format landing page
refactor: simplify player logic
test: add unit tests for useDonation
chore: update dependencies
```

### Deployment (MVP)

| Platform | Use Case | Free Tier |
|:---------|:---------|:----------|
| **Vercel** | Frontend hosting | ✅ Yes |
| **GitHub** | Code repository | ✅ Yes |

```typescript
// tailwind.config.ts
const config = {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        primary: {
          orange: "#FF6B35",
          "orange-hover": "#E55A2B",

        error: "#EF4444",
        warning: "#F59E0B",

      fontFamily: {
        sans: ["Inter", "system-ui", "sans-serif"],
      },
      borderRadius: {
        sm: "8px",
        md: "12px",
        lg: "16px",
      },
      boxShadow: {

        card: "0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)",
      },
    },
  },
};
```

| Payment Gateway | ⏳ Mock Only | Simulated success/failure |
| Backend API | ❌ Not in MVP | Planned post-validation |
| Database | ❌ Not in MVP | Planned post-validation |
